---
title: "Press Democrat features grazing on front page"
date: 2026-05-06
description: "Local paper features coverage of grazing for wildfire risk mitigation"
categories: [news, grazing]
---



```{=html}
<iframe src="/files/Press_Democrat_Grazing_2026-05-06.pdf" width="100%" height="800px" style="border: none;"></iframe>
```

<a href="/files/Press_Democrat_Grazing_2026-05-06.pdf">Download pdf</a>
